aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite PureComfort HVAC Service due to insufficient structured data and conversational content. While they have a solid local presence, they lack the depth needed for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Expand service pages with conversational, value-driven content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI's ability to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Denver' and 'best AC installation services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with detailed, conversational answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on common HVAC issues and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making PureComfort the go-to HVAC expert in Denver.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in relevant queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance their online presence with structured data, conversational content, and active GBP engagement to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Your Path to Dominating Denver HVAC Searches
opening_line: After analyzing your website and online presence, it's clear that while you have a strong local foundation, there's untapped potential in AI-driven search.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital strategy for AI search and drive more qualified leads.
